case_title: RICHARD CARTER VS. HANFORD & FREUND COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CARTER, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT HANFORD & FREUND COMPANY (JOHN FALVEY, OWNER) STAR, JESSICA FALVEY, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
